candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line above operating profit, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to cover broader operating D&A. No COGS-specific D&A row is visible, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification/double counting.
Component of the total D&A line, not specifically tied to COGS. Inferior to the summary row and still not bucket-specific.
Component of the total D&A line, not specifically tied to COGS. Using it for COGS would be speculative.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-related depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A lines are separate operating expenses at the same level, but they are not identified as belonging to cost of sales, so the conservative no-double-count choice is to add nothing to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line above operating profit, presented separately from the selected SG&A component rows. Since selected XSGA rows are salaries/stock comp/blank SG&A and no separate R&D row exists, this summary D&A line appears to sit outside those selected rows and is the best single row to add separately.
Component of the summary D&A line. Do not use if the total 'Depreciation and amortisation' row is selected.
Component of the summary D&A line. Do not use if the total 'Depreciation and amortisation' row is selected.
Balancing row with zeros; not an expense row to add.

variables.notes: Use the summary D&A row only. It is a separate operating line above financial items and appears outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately later. Components are excluded to avoid double counting.
